message:
ftui-harness: add 14 golden.rs tests (logger, result format, file I/O)

Covers previously untested areas:
- GoldenLogger file I/O (writes valid JSONL events)
- GoldenResult::format() for all outcome variants
- save/load_golden_checksums roundtrip
- Comment/blank line filtering in checksum files
- GoldenEnv::to_json produces valid JSON
- GoldenOutcome::as_str values

Total lib tests: 270 (was 256).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
